footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js & deployed on AWS

hero.intro: Merging over five years of corporate finance experience with cutting-edge AI/ML skills. Building intelligent solutions end-to-end.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who I Am
about.summary1: Data Scientist and AI Engineer merging over five years of corporate finance experience at Otto Group with cutting-edge AI/ML skills. Currently writing my Master's thesis on GraphRAG Document Intelligence as part of my M.Sc. Data Science & AI at FH Wedel.
about.summary2: Proven end-to-end delivery, from multi-agent B2B sales pipelines to plant health detection with deep learning. I build intelligent solutions that create measurable business impact.

business.title: Business × Data
business.description: 5 years at Otto Group in corporate finance, now merging business acumen with AI/ML engineering.
expanded: HGB and IFRS group reporting for multiple Otto Group subsidiaries
SAP FI-CO and BPC consolidation, monthly/quarterly/annual closes
Led RPA automations with UiPath for vacation accruals and interest schedules
IFRS implementation projects (IFRS 7, 9, 13) and options valuation
Main contact for external auditors and consulting firms
Advanced Accounting & Taxation Program ‘Bilanzbuchhalter’ at GFS Steuerfachschule (2018 – 2020)

builder.title: End-to-End Builder
builder.description: From concept to MVP: multi-agent B2B sales pipeline that cut manual research by roughly half.
expanded: B2B multi-agent sales pipeline at Datalogue: 4 LLM agents plus human-in-the-loop feedback
Generic news-crawler pipeline with PostgreSQL 3NF schema and vector semantic search
Urban farming plant disease detection: hierarchical 3-stage pipeline, ViT and CNN, Grad-CAM plus Attention Rollout
This portfolio site: Next.js 16, AWS CDK, full i18n across 4 locales including Arabic RTL
Full-stack MyRecipes app: Java Spring Boot, React, MongoDB, AI-powered suggestions

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.description: German (C2, daily), English (full professional, daily), Arabic (native), Spanish (elementary, learning), French (elementary).
expanded: German: current level C2, working daily at full professional level, last certified Telc C1 for business
English: full professional proficiency, daily use in tech and business contexts. B.Sc. was taught fully in English.
Arabic: native speaker from Damascus, Syria
Spanish: elementary, actively learning toward B1
French: elementary from school

education.title: M.Sc. Data Science & AI
education.description: FH Wedel: deep learning, NLP, computer vision, econometrics, e-commerce, strategic management.
expanded: Core: Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Machine Learning, Symbolic AI, Econometrics
Business track: Category Management, E-Commerce Business Models, Digital Transformation
Process: Agile Project Management, Change Management, Strategic Management, Organizational Theory
Technical: Unix and Shell Programming, Data Engineering, Empirical Research Methods
Thesis in progress: Document Intelligence + Knowledge Graph Construction (Donut, LayoutLMv3, GraphRAG, local-first)

journey.tagline: From ledgers in Damascus to multi-agent systems in Hamburg.
